blocks.text: Riido task: RIID-4635 `[Cli] 기존 riido_daemon CLI 마이그레이션 계획/문서화`.
This entrypoint defines how the CLI surface of the former private `riido_daemon` repository moves into public `riido-daemon`.

The CLI remains here because it is the user/operator entrypoint for the customer-PC daemon. It is documented separately from the long-running daemon runtime so command ownership, compatibility, and store-review constraints stay clear.
